dissatisfy
Dissatisfy all the
contrast ratio
AlgoArena
Color psychology is the study of colors and hues
as a determinant human behavior. Color influences
perceptions that are not obvious, as the taste
of food. Colors qualities that may cause
certain emotions in people.
